paths_read: current working directory metadata needed by npx
paths_written: user-level skills install directory used by `npx skills add -g`
rationale: The skill explicitly instructs the agent to check the skills.sh leaderboard, run `npx skills find`, verify GitHub reputation, and optionally install with `npx skills add <owner/repo@skill> -g -y`. That implies network access to skills.sh, npm package resolution for `npx`, and GitHub endpoints for repository metadata and source downloads. Installation writes to the user-level skills directory and npm/npx cache, while searches and installs may read npm config/cache and existing installed skills metadata.
